MINI MINUTES FOR APR-08-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF CURTIS MCCLAIN IS DENIED. CLAIMANT CURTIS MCCLAIN HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT THE WITHHELD FUNDS OF $ 3,279.67 FROM PATELCO CREDIT UNION IS NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT OF THE SUPPORT OF HIS SPOUSE AND DEPENDENTS. THE SHERIFF IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE THE WITHHELD FUNDS TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Curtis McClain is denied. Claimant Curtis McClain has not demonstrated that the withheld funds of $ 3,279.67 from Patelco Credit Union is necessary for his support of the support of his spouse and dependents. The Sheriff is directed to release the withheld funds to Judgment Creditor. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
